story.iWant: to embed existing EndorServices within my EndorHybridService
story.soThat: I can reuse business logic without code duplication
story.tasks: - Task 1: Design service embedding interface and delegation patterns (AC: 1, 2, 3) - Task 2: Implement dependency sharing and lifecycle management (AC: 4) - Task 3: Enable middleware inheritance and composition (AC: 5) - Task 4: Maintain type safety and interface contracts (AC: 6) - Task 5: Support multiple embedded services (AC: 7) - Task 6: Integration testing and performance validation (AC: 1-7)

story-context.acceptanceCriteria: 1. Service Embedding Interface: EndorHybridService provides EmbedService(prefix string, service EndorServiceInterface) method 2. Method Delegation: Embedded service methods accessible through hybrid service interface with configurable prefix namespacing 3. Method Resolution: Method name conflicts resolved with clear precedence rules (hybrid service methods take priority) 4. Dependency Management: Embedded service dependencies properly managed by parent service's DI container without duplication 5. Middleware Inheritance: Embedded services maintain their own middleware stack while inheriting parent service middleware 6. Type Safety Preservation: Service composition preserves compile-time type safety and method signatures 7. Multiple Service Support: Multiple services can be embedded with clear method resolution and namespace isolation

artifact.title: Product Requirements Document
artifact.snippet: FR17: EndorHybridService can embed other EndorServices through dependency injection. FR3: Developers can compose services within services using dependency injection patterns. FR18: Services can share common dependencies without coupling to implementations.

artifact.title: Refactored Architecture Document
artifact.snippet: Decorator pattern with middleware pipeline enables clean service composition. EndorHybridService can wrap EndorService instances through method delegation with clear precedence rules and type-safe composition.

artifact.title: Epic Breakdown
artifact.snippet: Story 3.2: Enable EndorService Embedding in EndorHybridService. Prerequisites: Story 3.1 (middleware pipeline). Supports dependency sharing between parent and embedded services with multiple embedded services support.

artifact.title: Middleware Pipeline Implementation
artifact.snippet: Successful service decoration pattern with WithMiddleware() provides template for embedded service enhancement. DecoratedService wrapper demonstrates effective approach for service composition through method delegation.

artifact.reason: Primary implementation requiring EmbedService() method and method delegation functionality
Target service type for embedding and source of decoration pattern via DecoratedService
Interface contracts that must be preserved during service embedding implementation
Middleware infrastructure that embedded services must inherit and maintain
DI container patterns needed for embedded service dependency sharing and lifecycle management

story-context.constraints: - Service embedding MUST NOT break existing EndorService or EndorHybridService interface contracts - Method resolution MUST provide clear, predictable precedence rules to prevent ambiguity (hybrid > embedded > inherited) - Dependency sharing MUST optimize memory usage while ensuring service isolation - Middleware inheritance MUST preserve both parent and embedded service middleware behavior - Performance overhead MUST remain minimal (target: < 20μs for method delegation) - EmbedService() should follow WithMiddleware() fluent API design patterns from Story 3.1 - Service decoration patterns from DecoratedService must extend to support embedded service hierarchies - Integration with DI container from Epic 2 for dependency resolution and sharing - Build foundation for Story 3.3 (shared dependency management) and Story 3.4 (composition utilities)

interface.name: EmbedService
interface.signature: func (h *EndorHybridService) EmbedService(prefix string, service EndorServiceInterface) error

interface.name: EndorServiceInterface
interface.signature: interface with GetResource(), GetMethods(), GetDescription(), etc.

interface.name: MiddlewareInterface
interface.signature: interface with Before(ctx interface{}) error, After(ctx interface{}, response interface{}) error

tests.standards: Unit tests use testify/mock for behavior verification with interface mocks. Integration tests use in-memory repositories. Test structure follows Given-When-Then pattern. Build tags separate unit tests (//go:build unit) from integration tests (//go:build integration). All tests include interface compliance validation and performance benchmarks where applicable.

ideas.test: Unit test EmbedService() method with mock EndorService instances, verify prefix handling and method delegation
Unit test method name resolution with conflicting method names across multiple embedded services
Unit test precedence rules ensuring hybrid service methods take priority over embedded service methods
Integration test dependency sharing between parent and embedded services using real DI container
Unit test middleware inheritance with embedded services maintaining their own middleware stack while inheriting parent middleware
Unit test type safety preservation through service composition using interface compliance tests
Integration test multiple embedded services with namespace isolation and method routing
Benchmark test method delegation overhead ensuring < 20μs target is met
Unit test circular embedding detection and prevention with structured error types
